name: zenith-man
description: McCracken Poston Jr.'s legal memoir — challenging public narratives, defending the unpopular, finding hidden truth, and the price of doing the right thing.
useCase: Challenging dominant narratives, defending unpopular clients, investigating beneath the surface, managing difficult clients, navigating small town justice.
knownRisks: Poston writes from his perspective as the defense attorney — the book is not a neutral account
The legal strategies described may not apply in all jurisdictions
Some details have been changed for privacy
